name: facebook-skills
description: 5 Claude Code and Codex skills for Facebook Pages marketing: short punchy Page posts that favor the under-80-character engagement sweet spot, AI-tell humanizer with pre-publish audit, high-share post hook extraction, comment-reply drafting, and weekly Page content planning. Publora is the default publish layer for Page posts.

interface.shortDescription: Facebook Pages marketing skills for Claude Code and Codex.
interface.longDescription: A bundle of 5 Facebook Pages marketing skills for Claude Code and Codex: short punchy Page-post writing, humanizing, high-share hook extraction, comment-reply drafting, and weekly Page content planning.
defaultPrompt: Write a short punchy Facebook Page post from my notes.
Draft replies to the comments on my latest Page post.
Plan a week of Facebook Page content.
